description: How Runtime Assembler maps runtime renderers to provider-neutral design page type templates.
usage: Read outputs/design-handoff/design-handoff.json before implementing or updating runtime renderers.
Use Figma get_design_context for Figma templates when implementation detail is unclear.
Use generated config, theme, page visual map, and local assets for config prototype templates.
Do not require one design frame or screen per funnel page; templates map to renderer types.
